grants.description: An award presented to outstanding Master of Information and Cybersecurity (MICS) capstone projects. Projects are evaluated by a panel of judges based on originality, potential impact, completeness, security thinking, and presentation quality.

grants.grant_title: Allama Muhammad Iqbal Scholarships For Students
grants.description: The Allama Iqbal Scholarships offer international students from Central Asian and friendly countries the opportunity to pursue undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral degree programs in Pakistan. The fully funded program aims to foster academic collaboration, knowledge exchange, and mutual cultural understanding.

grants.grant_title: International Security Program Fellowships
grants.funder_name: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs
grants.description: The International Security Program hosts pre- and postdoctoral research fellows each year to develop and train new talent in security studies. Fellows contribute to academic debates and policy-oriented research in international security.

grants.grant_title: Graduate School Of Development (Gsd) Visitors Programme
grants.description: A visitor initiative designed to promote research activity, collaboration, and access to resources in Central Asia. The programme hosts professors, researchers, doctoral students, and interns with overlapping research or educational interests with GSD, but it is not a funded scheme and visitors must cover their own costs.

grants.grant_title: Spinoza Prize
grants.description: The highest Dutch award in science, awarded to top researchers to spend on research of their choice.

grants.grant_title: Eli Graduate Student Fellowship Program
grants.description: Provides opportunities for talented emerging leaders from the UAE and the Arab world to earn master's degrees at the Harvard Kennedy School. The fellowship includes a full tuition scholarship, health insurance, and a living stipend.

grants.grant_title: Global Partnerships Programs Fellows
grants.description: A fellowship program designed to support individuals and researchers engaging in global partnerships and Japanese studies to foster cultural exchange and dialogue.

grants.grant_title: Performing Arts Japan (Paj) For North America
grants.description: The Performing Arts Japan (PAJ) program supports performing arts projects that promote cultural exchange between Japan and North America. It funds touring and collaboration projects involving Japanese artists in the United States and Canada.

grants.grant_title: Veni 2012
grants.description: The Veni grant is part of the NWO Talent Programme, designed to support researchers who have recently completed their PhDs. It provides funding to conduct independent research and advance scientific knowledge across various disciplines.

grants.grant_title: Bellagio Center Group Convenings And Residencies
grants.description: The Rockefeller Foundation's Bellagio Center offers group convenings and residencies to bring global leaders, artists, and scholars together to address the world's most pressing challenges.

grants.grant_title: MSCA Work Programme 2026-2027 - General Annexes
grants.description: This document outlines the general annexes for the Marie Skłodowska-Curie Actions (MSCA) Work Programme for 2026-2027, which supports doctoral networks, postdoctoral fellowships, staff exchanges, and COFUND initiatives.

grants.grant_title: Big Bets Climate Fellowship
grants.description: A fellowship program designed to provide leaders with programming, networking, and professional development opportunities to implement bold climate solutions effectively and at scale across Latin America and the Caribbean.

grants.grant_title: Online Seminar Programme For Universities In Kyrgyzstan
grants.description: A practice-oriented online seminar series designed to strengthen research skills, methodology, and publishing capacity for faculty and researchers at public universities in Kyrgyzstan.
grants.deadline_notes: No deadline specified. Seminars run monthly from Spring semester 2025 through Spring semester 2027.

grants.grant_title: Food Is Medicine Initiative
grants.description: A funding initiative that aims to unlock the power and potential of good food to improve health conditions, supporting organizations like FreshRx Oklahoma to provide fresh produce and health education to residents with Type 2 diabetes.

grants.grant_title: Mission 300
grants.funder_name: World Bank Group and the African Development Bank (AfDB)
grants.description: A collaborative initiative supported by The Rockefeller Foundation and the Global Energy Alliance to bring electricity to 300 million Africans by 2030 through off-grid, mini-grid, and solar projects.

grants.grant_title: Uca Financial Assistance Programme
grants.description: Financial assistance guaranteed to all accepted undergraduate students at the School of Arts and Sciences to ensure quality education is accessible and affordable. The assistance heavily subsidises tuition, room and board, a laptop, and health insurance, with students contributing an average of 5% of the actual cost.

grants.grant_title: Invitation Program Of Literary Editors
grants.description: This program invites overseas editors to visit Japan for a short period of time to learn first-hand about Japanese literature, books, the publishing industry, society, and culture. The goal is to encourage foreign publishers to translate and publish more Japanese works in their languages and to network with Japanese literary professionals.

grants.grant_title: Graduate Studies Programme
grants.description: The WASCAL Graduate Studies Programme supports and facilitates academic education amongst West African universities in association with German counterpart institutions. It funds and trains doctoral and Master's students in climate change, renewable energy, and green hydrogen.

grants.grant_title: Junior Star
grants.description: Grants intended for excellent early-career scientists to fund basic research projects. Applicants must have substantial experience abroad, a strong publication record in international journals, and have received their PhDs no more than 8 years ago.

grants.grant_title: Startup Voucher
grants.funder_name: National Science and Technology Development Agency (NSTDA)
grants.description: A scheme designed to assist startups to expand their markets by providing funding support for marketing campaigns, promotional channels, and international events. The program aims to help startups scale up, create international visibility, and initiate technological and business collaboration.

grants.grant_title: Ned Grant
grants.description: Funding to support civil society groups, such as the Free Sight Association in Tunisia, to engage and educate citizens about gender equality, human rights, and democracy.

grants.grant_title: Beijing Center For Japanese Studies Support Programs
grants.description: Provides opportunities for master's and doctoral students at the Beijing Center for Japanese Studies to travel to Japan for dissertation research and material collection. The program also funds operational expenses, publication costs, and academic exchanges such as international workshops.

grants.grant_title: Doctoral Research Programme On Climate Change And Economics
grants.description: A doctoral scholarship opportunity focused on applying economic rationality to analyze adaptation and mitigation strategies related to climate change. The programme is hosted by Cheikh Anta Diop University (UCAD) in Senegal and aims to develop capacities to assess climate impacts and develop green economy strategies.

grants.grant_title: Hec And The University Of Melbourne, Australia (Uom) PhD Scholarships
grants.funder_name: Higher Education Commission (HEC) of Pakistan and The University of Melbourne (UoM)
grants.description: This scholarship program provides PhD scholarships to Pakistani students wishing to enroll at the University of Melbourne. The University of Melbourne provides tuition-free scholarships, while HEC covers living allowances, return airfare, and Overseas Student Health Cover.

grants.grant_title: Ukraine Relief, Recovery, Reconstruction And Reform Trust Fund (Urtf)
grants.description: A multi-donor trust fund established to help Ukraine maintain essential public services, meet urgent needs, and lay the foundation for long-term reconstruction across critical sectors including education, energy, health, transport, housing, and agriculture.

grants.grant_title: Humboldt Residency Programme 2025
grants.description: A residency programme bringing together researchers, artists, journalists, and practitioners to collaborate on a specific annual theme, with the 2025 cohort focusing on 'The Future of Food'. The programme includes a two-week phase at Schloss Wiepersdorf followed by six weeks in Berlin.

grants.grant_title: 2019 Democracy Award: Defenders Of Human And Religious Rights In China
grants.description: An award honoring three outstanding organizations confronting authoritarian tactics on the front lines in China, empowering Tibetans, Uyghurs, and Chinese Christians to defend their rights, preserve their culture, and live their faith.

grants.grant_title: The Nansen Support Programme For Ukraine
grants.description: A Norwegian support programme providing civil, humanitarian, and military assistance to Ukraine to support critical public systems, reduce human suffering, and aid recovery. Funding is distributed across key sectors including energy, humanitarian aid, human rights, and civil society.

grants.grant_title: Children'S Literature Collection Grant
grants.description: A program that provides selected children's literature books to libraries at Japan Foundation overseas offices and associated organizations in the countries where these offices are located.

grants.grant_title: Invitation Program For Young Muslim Intellectuals In Southeast Asia
grants.description: A training program in Japan for young researchers and Muslim intellectuals from Southeast Asia. The program aims to help participants understand more about Japan, build stronger relations, and establish networks with researchers in Islamic Area Studies.

grants.grant_title: Civil Society Cooperation Program
grants.description: A program supporting international development cooperation activities of Civil Society Organizations (CSOs) working towards reducing poverty and promoting welfare in developing countries.

grants.grant_title: Nansen Support Programme For Ukraine - Support For Moldova
grants.description: Funding provided under the Nansen Support Programme to assist Moldova with economic uncertainty, energy crises, security threats, and humanitarian needs resulting from the war in Ukraine.

grants.grant_title: International Master’S Programme In Energy And Green Hydrogen (Imp-Egh)
grants.funder_name: Forschungszentrum Jülich and RWTH Aachen University
grants.description: A capacity-building master's programme designed to qualify students in West African countries for the future topic of energy and green hydrogen.

grants.grant_title: Master Research Programme On Informatics For Climate Change (Mrp-Informcc)
grants.funder_name: German Federal Ministry of Research, Technology and Space (BMFTR)
grants.description: A two-year fully funded Master's research scholarship program aimed at training West African experts in scientific computation and climate data management. The program is hosted at the Université Joseph KI ZERBO in Burkina Faso and includes coursework, research, and internships.
grants.deadline_notes: The page mentions a deadline of 31 May 2026 for a separate recruitment of an independent software engineer consultant, but no specific application deadline is explicitly stated for the Master's program admissions.

grants.grant_title: Doctoral Programme Climate Change And Water Resources
grants.description: A three-year structured doctoral scholarship programme hosted at the University of Abomey-Calavi in Benin. The programme combines coursework and research focused on climate change, climate variability, and their impacts on water resources in West Africa.

grants.grant_title: Doctoral Programme Climate Change And Land Use (Cclu) Scholarship
grants.description: A full scholarship opportunity for a doctoral programme focusing on capacity building for sustainable land use and management in the face of climate change. The programme trains participants in data acquisition, spatial data analysis, remote sensing, and GIS in partnership with German institutions.

grants.grant_title: Vidi 2020
grants.description: The Vidi grant enables experienced researchers to develop their own innovative line of research and set up their own research group.

grants.grant_title: Opec Fund Grants
grants.description: The OPEC Fund provides grants and financial operations to support sustainable economic and social development, with a focus on micro-, small- and medium-sized enterprises, decent work, economic growth, industry, innovation, and infrastructure.

grants.grant_title: Vici 2013
grants.description: The Vici grant is part of the NWO Talent Programme, providing funding for senior researchers to conduct research and build up their own research group over a five-year period.

grants.grant_title: Tenure Track Projects
grants.description: Funding programme supporting tenure track projects to help establish independent research careers for outstanding scientists.

grants.grant_title: Island Resilience Facility
grants.description: The Island Resilience Facility delivers tailored solutions and strategic funding approaches specifically designed to enhance climate resilience in Small Island Developing States (SIDS). It channels climate financing to SIDS through technical assistance, preparation funds, capacity building, and financing for bankable green and digital solutions.

grants.grant_title: Perennial Fund Ii
grants.description: The Rockefeller Foundation has invested in Mad Capital's Perennial Fund II to help scale regenerative organic agriculture in the United States.

grants.grant_title: The Bellagio Center Convening Program
grants.description: The Bellagio Center Convening Program hosts small, immersive gatherings of up to 22 participants to drive progress on pressing global challenges. The program provides facilities, meals, accommodations, and ground transportation in Italy for convenings that align with a charitable purpose and the Foundation's mission.
grants.deadline_notes: Applications are reviewed on a quarterly basis, based on the date range requested for the proposed convening.

grants.grant_title: The Rockefeller Foundation Grants
grants.description: Funding to support Food is Medicine implementers that provide medically tailored nutrition, advocate for policy change, and support local suppliers to contribute to jobs, local economic development, and sustainable food systems.

grants.grant_title: Japan Foundation Grant Programs
grants.description: The Japan Foundation offers various grant programs to support individuals and organizations planning international cultural exchange projects. Support is provided across three major areas: Arts and Cultural Exchange, Japanese-Language Education Overseas, and Japanese Studies and Global Partnerships.

grants.grant_title: Funding To UNICEF
grants.description: UNICEF accepts voluntary contributions from governments, foundations, businesses, and individuals to protect children's rights and reach those most at risk. Funding is grouped into Core Resources, Thematic Funding, and Restricted Funding to support global child development and humanitarian programmes.

grants.grant_title: Symposia Co-Organized With The Japanese-German Center Berlin
grants.description: An annual symposium co-organized by the Japan Foundation and the Japanese-German Center Berlin to promote intellectual exchange and dialogue between Germany and Japan. Experts discuss social issues and themes common to both countries to strengthen international intellectual networks and enhance mutual understanding.

grants.grant_title: Gacr President’S Awards
grants.description: An annual award presented by the President of the Czech Science Foundation to appreciate outstanding results achieved within basic research projects funded by GACR.

grants.grant_title: Innovative Finance Support For Mombak
grants.description: Support and financing provided to Brazilian startup Mombak to scale its high-quality carbon removal platform through native reforestation in the Amazon. The initiative aims to transition land use from cattle pasture to native forest, generating high-quality carbon credits.

grants.grant_title: Central Asian Faculty Development Programme
grants.description: A programme designed to support the professional and academic development of faculty members in Central Asia, fostering interdisciplinary research and pedagogical skills.

grants.grant_title: Jf Nihongo Network ("Sakura Network")
grants.description: A global network of Japanese language education institutions that can utilize various grant and support programs provided by the Japan Foundation to enhance Japanese language education in their respective regions.

grants.grant_title: Vici 2020
grants.description: Vici is one of the largest grants for individuals in the Netherlands and targets advanced researchers. The funding enables scientists to set up their own innovative line of research and put together their own research group.

grants.grant_title: Arab Technology Business Plan Competition
grants.description: Annual competition for technology-based business plans, supporting entrepreneurs in developing viable tech ventures with strong commercialization potential.

grants.grant_title: Lily L. Chang Mics Capstone Award
grants.description: An award honoring the top capstone projects completed by students during their final semester in the Master of Information and Cybersecurity (MICS) program.

grants.grant_title: NWO Spinoza Prize 2017
grants.description: The NWO Spinoza Prize is the highest Dutch award in science, awarded to top researchers to be used for scientific research.

grants.grant_title: 2025 NRF Awards: Call For Nominations
grants.description: Nominations are open for the Special Award Categories of the NRF Awards. The awards celebrate the hard work of individual researchers and benefit their institutions by growing their status.

grants.grant_title: NWO Domain Science Awards
grants.description: The NWO Domain Science awards five special scientific prizes every year to recognize inspirational teamwork, science communication, diversity initiatives, and the societal impact of scientific results.

grants.grant_title: Cca Curator Meeting 2013
grants.description: A three-day conference of contemporary art curatorial practice bringing together international curators to exchange ideas and address key questions around museums and curating.

grants.grant_title: Open Science Infrastructure Support
grants.description: NWO supports a number of non-profit, community-led initiatives that aim to innovate scholarly communication and advance open science infrastructures.

grants.grant_title: Cca Curator Meeting
grants.description: A program where curators exchange ideas to tackle key questions around museum and contemporary art curatorial practice.

grants.grant_title: Generic Call For Proposals (Aapg) 2023
grants.description: The AAPG is the ANR's main call for proposals, mobilising five funding instruments to support individual research projects by young researchers, single-team research projects, and collaborative research projects at national or international levels.

grants.grant_title: Traveling Exhibitions Program
grants.description: The Japan Foundation co-organizes traveling exhibitions with diplomatic missions abroad and local cultural organizations to introduce Japanese arts and culture overseas. The program features permanent exhibitions covering traditional Japanese beauty, contemporary art, photography, design, and crafts.

grants.grant_title: Southeast Asia-Europe Joint Funding Scheme For Research And Innovation
grants.funder_name: Southeast Asia-Europe Joint Funding Scheme for Research and Innovation (JFS)
grants.description: An instrument for funding bi-regional research and innovation projects between Southeast Asia and Europe. Funding is provided by national, regional, or local agencies and ministries from the participating countries.

grants.grant_title: AI For Good
grants.description: A collaborative initiative that leverages artificial intelligence, machine learning, and geospatial data to address global challenges in sustainability, fundamental rights, disaster response, and conservation.
thematic_sectors: Disaster Risk Reduction and Humanitarian Response

grants.grant_title: Exhibiting At The 63Rd Bologna Children’S Book Fair
grants.description: The Japan Foundation and the Japanese Board on Books for Young People host a joint booth at the Bologna Children's Book Fair to exhibit Japanese children's books and illustrator portfolios. The initiative aims to promote Japan's book industry to overseas publishers, translators, and illustrators.

grants.grant_title: Indigenous Ph.D. Fellowship Program Phase-I Batch-Iv
grants.description: A PhD fellowship program offered by the Higher Education Commission (HEC) of Pakistan for the academic year 2016-17. The program requires applicants to pass an aptitude test with a score of 50 or above to be considered for the final merit list.

grants.grant_title: Traveling Exhibitions
grants.description: The Japan Foundation organizes traveling exhibitions, such as 'I Love Sushi', to introduce Japanese culture and arts worldwide. These exhibitions are hosted in collaboration with international venues and museums.

grants.grant_title: Berkeley Doctoral Completion Fellowship (Dcf)
grants.description: A fellowship providing eligible doctoral students who have advanced to candidacy with one year of tuition remission and a stipend for living expenses.

grants.grant_title: Support For Collaborative Creations Between Japanese And International Artists International Creations In Performing Arts
grants.description: This program supports international collaborative creations in the performing arts between Japanese and international artists. It aims to foster cultural exchange and explore new artistic models through joint creative processes and performances.

grants.grant_title: U.S. And European Museum Infrastructure Support Program
grants.description: This program provides support to U.S. and European museums to promote the effective use of their Japanese art collections. It aims to assist in establishing the infrastructure needed to exhibit Japanese art.

grants.grant_title: The Best Co-Op Student Award
grants.description: An award program that recognizes and celebrates outstanding undergraduate students for their exceptional performance, dedication, and achievements during their Co-operative Education experiences.

grants.grant_title: Vici 2023
grants.description: Vici is one of the largest scientific grants for individuals in the Netherlands, intended for advanced researchers. It enables scientists to set up their own innovative line of research and put together their own research group.

grants.grant_title: Training Programs For Foreign Specialists And Learners
grants.description: Training programs that invite foreign specialists, diplomats, public officials, researchers, graduate students, and high-achieving language learners to Japan to study Japanese language and culture.
